name: @iqbspecs/unit-rich-notes
author: IQB - Institut zur Qualitätsentwicklung im Bildungswesen
description: Specification for rich text notes as part of the unit data.

scripts.generate_docs: asyncapi generate fromTemplate ./make_doc/asyncapi.yaml @asyncapi/html-template --param config=make_doc/asyncapi.config.json -o ./public --force-write --use-new-generator && cat make_doc/add.css >> ./public/css/global.min.css
